caption: A man with short dark hair and a groomed beard is seated in a recording studio, positioned in front of a professional condenser microphone on a boom arm. He wears large over-ear headphones and a black garment over a grey shirt. The background consists of dark grey acoustic foam panels with a ribbed texture. Across the sequence, the man exhibits various facial expressions while speaking into the microphone. He begins by looking upward with wide eyes, then shifts his gaze forward with a neutral expression. He then closes his eyes and tilts his head slightly before glancing to the side. As he speaks, he gestures with his right hand, which enters the frame toward the end of the sequence. No text or logos are visible in the scene.
